title: Sunset live music at Cova d'en Xoroi
location: Cova d'en Xoroi, Cala en Porter (Alaior)
description: Live music and DJ sunset sessions at Cova d'en Xoroi, a natural cave carved into the cliffs of Cala en Porter with terraces stepping down over the sea. The music sunset sessions run through the summer season (roughly May to October); specific programme and artists to be confirmed on the official site.
